antipattern.description: Benchmarking on a 10k subset and shipping to a 5M corpus.
antipattern.reason: Latency p95 misses real distribution. Detector: bench.vector_count != production_vector_count. Fix: r1-bench-on-real-shape.

antipattern.description: DB configured with l2 distance for a cosine-trained embedder.
antipattern.reason: Score scale wrong; recall degrades silently. Detector: distance != embedder.distance. Fix: r5-dim-and-distance-match-embedder.

antipattern.description: DB-specific client calls scattered across the codebase.
antipattern.reason: Swap takes weeks. Detector: vendor SDK imports outside one wrapper module. Fix: r3-abstract-behind-base.
